title: British Week 2025 in Paraguay
body: "The British Embassy in Asunción is delighted to announce the British Week 2025 in Paraguay from Saturday 6 September to Saturday 13 September 2025.  This new edition of British Week will feature events aimed at all ages and interests to promote British excellence.  The calendar of events for the week is available below with details of all the activities that will take place during this celebration of British heritage in Paraguay.  All week long   British Tea Box Sets available at Teatime Bakery   British-inspired desserts at Doña Angela, available in selected locations:   Palmeras: De las Palmeras esq. Saravi España: Av. España esq. Nelson Mandela Julio Correa: Julio Correa esq. Hipólito Carrón Shopping Pinedo: Av. Mariscal López casi 26 de Febrero   British Products on display at Casa Rica  British Menu at Talleyrand La Maria Cocina y Carbón  British menu and beers at Sacramento Brewing Co  Daily raffles and prizes at the Embassy’s social media accounts: Instagram and X - Twitter    Daily Schedule  Save the date! For queries, please contact UKinParaguay@fcdo.gov.uk or message us on Instagram or Facebook.     Time Event Location Registration and Cost      Saturday 6 September 11:00 hr The Brunch Club - British Edition El Elegido (Austria y Denis Roa) Open access     16:00 hr Callecultura (Juan de Salazar entre Av. Artigas y San José) Open access, free of charge   Monday 8 September 12:00 hr British Live Cooking: Fish & Chips Casa Rica Molas López Open access, free of charge   Tuesday 9 September 15:30 hr Chevening Promotion Talks Ministerio de Relaciones Exteriores (Alberdi y Eduardo Victor Haedo) Private event     18:00 hr After-work Networking for English Speakers by The Asunción Times Cervecería Aurelia (Calle San Miguel, paralela a Av. Venezuela) Open access, limited capacity     19:15 hr Ambassador Book Reading at Literato Literato/Urbano Café (Papa Juan XXIII 1713 esq. Prof. Gómez Ríos, Asunción) Open access, free of charge with limited capacity   Wednesday 10 September 17:00 hr BOOKS Bookshop: Ambassador Reading Books, Mariscal López Shopping, Asunción Open access, free of charge     19:00 hr Youth Climate Talks Shopping Villa Morra Free of charge. Prior sign up required here.      21:00 hr Tribute to The Beatles JazzCube (Edificio Atrium, Dr. Fransico Morra esq. Guido Spano) Open access, free of charge with limited capacity   Thursday 11 September 12 hr Virtual Tour of Jane Austen’s House Museum Private Online exhibition - streaming online via Zoom Open access, limited availability, prior sign up required here.      18:30 hr Exclusive screening of Pride and Prejudice Cinemark Paseo La Galería Open access, limited availability. Prior sign up required here. Not suitable for guests under 16 years old     20:00 hr Britpop Tribute at Sacramento Brewing Co. Sacramento Brewing Co. (Av. Santísimo Sacramento 655 casi Av. España) Open access, free of charge. Info and reservations at 0971405014     20:00 hr Triumph British Night - The Spirit of Britain on Two Wheels Autopista Silvio Pettirossi km. 12 c/ Autopista Ñu Guasu - Luque Event by invitation only   Friday 12 September 18:30 hr Chevening After Office at Sacramento Brewing Co. Sacramento Brewing Co. (Av. Santísimo Sacramento 655 casi Av. España) Open access, prior sign up required here.      20:00...
